fields.label: Customer Naming By
fields.options:
Customer Name
Naming Series
Auto Name

fields.label: Is Sales Order required to create Sales Invoice/Delivery Note?
Is Delivery Note required to create Sales Invoice?

fields.description: The frequency at which project progress and company transaction details will be updated. Set it to daily or monthly if you post a lot of transactions.
fields.label: How often should sales data be updated in Company/Project?

fields.description: Warn or stop if Item rate is changed in Delivery Notes and Sales Invoices generated from a Sales Order.
fields.label: Maintain same rate throughout sales cycle
Allow editing Price List rate in transactions
Allow same Item to be added multiple times in a transaction
Allow multiple Sales Orders against a customer's Purchase Order

fields.description: Enable this to block transactions where the selling price is less than the purchase or valuation rate
fields.label: Validate selling price for Item against purchase or valuation rate

fields.description: Most Customers have a unique Tax ID that is fetched into selling transactions. Enable this setting if you do not want Customer Tax IDs to appear in sales transactions.
fields.label: Hide Customer's Tax ID from sales transactions
Action if same rate is not maintained throughout sales cycle
Role allowed to override stop action

fields.description:
Enabling this will do the following:
  • Make the rate column of all Packed/Bundle Items tables editable.
  • Calculate the prices of all Product Bundles in the Items table, based on the prices of its child Items, specified in the Packed/Bundle Items table.
Note: If this is enabled, updating the rate of the Product Bundle in the Items table will not change its price. It will get reset to the price based on its Child Items on saving the doc.
fields.label: Calculate Product Bundle price based on child Item's rates

fields.description: If enabled, additional ledger entries will be made for discounts in a separate Discount Account
fields.label: Enable discount accounting for selling

fields.description: This allows creation of sales orders from quotations that have passed their expiration date, providing flexibility in processing orders despite outdated quotes.
fields.label: Allow Sales Order creation for expired Quotation

fields.description: Prevents the automatic reservation of stock quantities from sales orders when processing sales returns.
fields.label: Don't reserve Sales Order qty on sales return

fields.description: Enable this option to permit the use of negative rates for items in sales transactions. This setting is useful for applying substantial discounts, processing refunds or returns, and handling special promotional pricing.
fields.label: Allow negative rates for Items

fields.description: Percentage you are allowed to sell beyond the Blanket Order quantity.
fields.label: Blanket Order Allowance (%)

fields.description: When enabled, it adds a cutoff date filter to Delivery Notes created in bulk from Sales Orders. This allows you to process orders only with a transaction date up to the specified cutoff date, which is useful for period-end processing and batch fulfillment.
fields.label: Enable cut-off date on creating bulk Delivery Notes
Allow Sales Order with zero quantity

fields.description: If enabled, system will allow user to deliver the entire quantity of the finished goods produced against the Subcontracting Inward Order. If disabled, system will allow delivery of only the ordered quantity.
fields.label: Allow delivery of overproduced quantity

fields.description: If no Item Price is found for an item in the Price List set in the transaction, prices from the Default Price List will be fetched.
fields.label: Use prices from Default Price List as fallback

fields.description: If enabled, system will set incoming rate as zero for stand-alone credit notes with expired batch item.
fields.label: Set incoming rate as zero for expired Batch

fields.description: Manage sales partner's and sales team's commissions
fields.label: Enable tracking sales commissions

fields.description: Enable Urchin Tracking Module parameters in Quotation, Sales Order, Sales Invoice, POS Invoice, Lead,  and Delivery Note.
fields.label: Enable UTM

fields.description: If enabled, the Secondary Items generated against a Finished Good will also be added in the Stock Entry when delivering that Finished Good.
fields.label: Deliver secondary Items

fields.description: Allow sales transactions with zero quantities if the rate is fixed but the quantities are not. e.g. Rate Contracts
fields.label: Zero-Quantity Line Items
